items.title: Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name
items.summary: When we last sat down with Jobs at TechCrunch Disrupt nearly three years ago, his firm Yosemite was brand new and biotech was still reeling from its post-pandemic crash. Now, the venture outfit has a team of 17; a cluster of blockbuster drugs are all losing patent protection in roughly the same window, creating all kinds of new opportunities; and AI has gone from a curiosity to, in Jobs's words, a huge part of what Yosemite does. "I didn't expect Yosemite to be moving this fast," he said.

items.title: Best of 9to5toys – This week’s top deals: Anker summer sale, MX Master 4, Apple, LG C6 OLED, more
items.summary: Good morning and welcome to Best of 9to5Toys Weekly – a one-stop shop for all of the week’s best deals on Apple gear, Samsung and Android tech, accessories for smartphones and Macs, intelligent household upgrades, and closet upgrades. This week’s highlights include the 2026 Anker summer sale with charging deals from $8, a rare price drop on Logitech’s latest haptics-enabled MX Master 4 mouse, this new wildly thin 0.27-inch MagSafe power bank, Nintendo’s Talking Flower, Bose gear, AirPods, and more. Check it out below.

items.title: Still live! Logitech’s latest haptics-enabled MX Master 4 just hit the lowest price of the year with a rare deal at $102
items.summary: We just spotted a deal at Lenovo that drops Amazon currently has it for $114 with a $6 on-page coupon, but Lenovo’s offer beats that with an additional $12 discount. Head below for more details.

items.title: 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly: Back to school Copilot+ PC/gaming laptops deals up to $900 off, OLED monitors, more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. This week we tracked a good mix of PC gaming deals, back-to-school laptop discounts, and setup upgrades that are still live and kicking. Some of the biggest highlights include a huge discount on Lenovo’s loaded RTX 5080 Legion Pro 7i, one of the better-value RTX 5070 gaming desktops we have seen in a while, and more. Best Buy also kicked off a huge Windows laptops sale with deals on the latest Copilot+ PCs and gaming notebooks. Notably, Alienware also debuted its 30th Anniversary gaming monitor lineup, all of which are now up for grabs for your battlestation.

items.title: Best Buy has Powerbeats Pro 2 with Find My and heart rate tracking starting at $116 (Up to $134 off, ‘excellent’ open-box)
items.summary: We are fresh off a one-day Beats flash sale at Best Buy, but you land some seriously deep deals on the latest Powerbeats Pro 2 with Find My today. You’ll now find open-box units at up to $134 off the new list price – the Quick Sand gray set is $116 and the Jet Black model is at $142. Details below.

items.title: Electrified Weekly – Lectric XP4 750, Xpress2, Xpeak2 e-bike sale, ENGWE 150-mile L16 e-bike $899, EGO 3,200 PSI pressure washer new low, more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. Leading this week’s best Green Deals is the latest Lectric 250th Anniversary Sale that is offering up to $464 in increased savings over the previous July 4th pricing on the XP4 750, Xpress2, and Xpeak2 e-bikes, as well as the first savings on ENGWE’s new single and dual-battery L16 Utility e-bike with up to 150 miles of travel range starting from $899. We also have a few power station sales from EcoFlow, Anker SOLIX, and Bluetti worth checking out, as well as loads of tool deals, like the popular EGO Power+ 3,200 PSI Electric Pressure Washer with 2x batteries at a new $679 low.

items.title: 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – Nike shoes and bags 38% off, Spigen sunglasses visor clips $3 each, minimalist water shoes $30, more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – your virtual wardrobe of discounted apparel finds. From top-tier fashion houses and everyday pieces for your work week, right through to super affordable pickups to freshen up your essentials, every week we scour the interwebs for the best deals on footwear and clothing to ensure you never pay full price to update your closet game. Some of our most popular coverage includes this selection of Nike shoe and bag picks at up to 38% off, a couple of Spigen sunglasses visor clips for just $3 each, as well as these minimalist water shoes down at $30. Head below to see all of the rest.

items.title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
items.summary: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.

items.title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
items.summary: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.

items.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
items.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
